entry: User asked to add meta-level session phases. Added Harden, Document, Curate, Audit, Refactor, Improve. Success.
Created cyberpunk poster for birthday invitation

Simulated 10 everyday tasks. Built activity-based continuity: BRAIN recall searches activity.jsonl, BRAIN log accepts --files/--task, BRAIN snapshot includes recent activity. BRAIN reflect adds Active Reminders section.
Strengthened BRAIN reflect+USERINPUT dual-command loop across all reinforcement layers: brain_inject, for_agent.md, ecosystem.py, clipboard suffix, and reflect output

Strengthened weak links for dumb agents: (1) core-loop.mdc Cursor rule enforces BRAIN reflect+USERINPUT, (2) IDE detection for Cursor/VSCode/Windsurf, (3) agent-brain.mdc updated with full BRAIN CLI, (4) brain_inject.py reports detected IDE, (5) new gap: IDE-agnostic hook framework

Fixed 2 critical weak links: (1) Re-enabled userinput_enforce.py stop hook - the ultimate safety net for agents that forget USERINPUT, (2) Added early reminders at tool calls 5 and 8 in brain_remind.py - fills the 500-call gap for dumb agents

Designed user interaction model: README.md 'Using with AI IDEs' section — user just types tasks, system handles everything. Emergency bootstrap one-liner for lost agents. Updated For AI Agents section with BRAIN reflect as key entry point.

Documented Cursor IDE quirks: (1) block_until_ms too short for USERINPUT - now explicit in userinput-timeout.mdc + core-loop.mdc + hooks/for_agent.md, (2) Search fails with spaces in paths - already handled by file_search_fallback.py hook, (3) Context summarization drops injected context - brain_remind compensates, (4) Added 'IDE Awareness' self-check dimension to for_agent_reflection.md

Added strategic pivoting guidance: (1) for_agent_reflection.md 'Strategic Pivoting' self-check, (2) for_agent.md 'Pivot on repeated failure' behavior, (3) ecosystem.py PIVOT directive, (4) strategy-pivot.mdc Cursor rule with pivot patterns table

Added knowledge creation motivation chain: (1) BRAIN digest now outputs specific SKILLS create commands, (2) for_agent.md Key commands now includes SKILLS learn/create and TOOL --dev create, (3) for_agent_reflection.md 'Knowledge Creation' self-check dimension, (4) BRAIN reflect now shows 'Creation Opportunities' section with lesson cluster counts and suggested commands

Added for_agent_reflection.md scope hierarchy: (1) root reflection = system-level, tool reflection = tool-specific, (2) BRAIN reflect --tool <NAME> reads tool-level gaps, (3) for_agent.md documentation convention updated to mention three-doc pattern, (4) Decision rule in for_agent_reflection.md: 'affects all future agents?' → root; 'only this tool?' → tool dir

Designed and implemented pluggable brain architecture: (1) blueprint.json defines 3 tiers (working/knowledge/episodic) with configurable backends, (2) BrainBackend abstract interface in logic/brain/base.py, (3) FlatFileBrainBackend reference implementation, (4) blueprint.py loader with BACKEND_REGISTRY for adding new backends, (5) interface/brain.py public API, (6) Batch-copied for_agent_reflection.md to 79 directories (59 tools + 18 logic modules + 2 iCloud)
